description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a neutral color palette. The sofa features two large, individual seat cushions and two prominent backrest cushions, each adorned with a bold, abstract pattern in shades of brown and beige. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the upholstery of the main body. The sofa stands on four short, square wooden legs, providing a sturdy base and a slight elevation from the ground. The upholstery appears to be a textured woven fabric, giving the sofa a tactile, inviting look. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with textured light upholstery, patterned back cushions, and sturdy wooden legs. The design is contemporary and inviting, with wide armrests and a neutral color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing two individual seat cushions, two patterned backrest cushions, and wide, padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's deep seat, thick armrest, and the profile of the backrest cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous textured upholstery across the back and the four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and cushion profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, individual seat cushions and two separate, patterned backrest cushions; all cushions appear loose and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at each end, matching the sofa's upholstery and sitting at seat height.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, square block legs made of wood, positioned at each corner and visibly exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; no tufting or channeling, cushions are patterned and distinct.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured woven fabric in a light neutral tone for the main body, with abstract geometric patterns in brown and beige on the backrest cushions.
